name: Wild Boar

abilities.name: Grow Up Strong (War Pig)
abilities.text: After this model removes an enemy Remains marker or enemy Scheme marker, this model may remove a Glutted token to replace itself with a War Pig and heal 4. If it does not have a Glutted token, it instead gains a Glutted token.

abilities.name: Thick Fat
abilities.text: When this model is dealt damage, it may remove a Glutted token to reduce the damage dealt by 2.

triggers.name: Crunch Down
triggers.text: This model either heals 2 or gains a Glutted token.

triggers.name: Collateral Damage
triggers.text: Remove a marker or a destructible terrain piece within 2" of the target.

triggers.name: Rampage
triggers.text: Move this model 5", ignoring enemy models. Models moved through this way must pass a TN 13 Sp duel or be dealt 1 damage.

actions.name: Rooting Around
actions.costs_and_restrictions: Once per activation. Target a Remains or Scheme marker.
actions.effects: Move this model up to 4" toward the target, then remove the target. (m)(m) Survival Skills: This model heals 1.

extraction_notes: The Survival Skills trigger text appears both in the main effects text and as a separate trigger. Interpreted as a trigger based on suit icons and bold formatting.
